title: How I went from 300$ to 3000$ a day on Polymarket
author: Haabr18-8
selftext:
when i first found polymarket i just checked it out for fun didn’t really expect anything and yeah i lost a few hundred at the start just not knowing what i’m doing but instead of quitting i kept going and started paying more attention to how things actually move and what matters

after a while i got into the idea of building something around it so i started working on a bot took me like 4–5 months a lot of late nights and i burned through some money testing stuff that just didn’t work but that’s kinda where you figure things out

eventually i got it to a point where it actually works it runs on 5 min candles and just gives direction based on a few things lining up and compared to how i was trading before it’s a huge difference

it’s been pretty consistent for me and yeah it’s making me some solid money now nothing crazy perfect but way better than guessing trades all the time

if you’re stuck right now just keep going that phase where nothing works is part of it it eventually starts to make sense📈
